title: Senior Teacher - IIM Calcutta Capital India - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIM Calcutta Capital India - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
IIM Calcutta Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Calcutta Capital India:
IIM Calcutta Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Calcutta Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
